phase-summary.outcome: Space Explorer chat now supports structured mutation proposals and validated apply flows for feature schema, model schema, model metadata, and model feature references.

file.description: Added structured JSON response contract with typed authoring operations and safe fallback parsing.
Added pending operation preview and explicit apply action in chat UI.
Implemented operation application engine with validation feedback and selection updates.

tests.test: docs-site typecheck passes after operation protocol and mutation wiring.

suggestion.gap: Requirements do not explicitly require typed operation contracts between model output and UI mutation layer.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: AI authoring mutations must use a typed operation schema with explicit user apply confirmation.

next.action: Close 50-10/50-11 by validating canonical asset and bundle build operations in the same chat flow.
